name: Smoky German Fondue
recipeIngredient: Rye bread and cooked frankfurters - to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the inside of the fondue pot with the cut side of the onion.
2. Pour in the ale and heat gently until bubbling.
3. Reduce the heat and gradually stir in the cheeses.
4. Heat slowly until the cheese melts, stirring frequently.
5. In a small bowl, blend the cornflour with milk.
6. Stir the mixture into the cheese with mustard until it is thick and creamy, stirring frequently.
7. Serve with cubes of rye bread and pieces of cooked frankfurters.
